title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google released two AI systems: Co-scientist, an AI co-scientist for automating medical research discoveries, and Robin, an agent system using consensus mechanisms. Both demonstrated breakthroughs in discovering treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, vision loss, and genetic diseases.
